sentences.translation: Dijete je čulo: «Crna se nasmijala crnoj boji».
sentences.translationEn: The child heard: «The dark one laughed at the darkness».

sentences.arabic: يُقَالُ هَذَا حِينَ يَنْتَقِدُ شَخْصٌ عَيْبًا هُوَ نَفْسُهُ يَمْلِكُهُ.
sentences.translation: Ovo se kaže kad neko kritikuje manu koju i sam ima.
sentences.translationEn: This is said when someone criticizes a flaw that he himself has.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ غَالِبٌ إِنَّ صَدِيقَهُ يَتَأَخَّرُ دَائِمًا.
sentences.translation: Galib je rekao da mu se prijatelj uvijek kasni.
sentences.translationEn: Ghalib said that his friend is always late.

sentences.arabic: ثُمَّ تَأَخَّرَ هُوَ نَفْسُهُ وَضَحِكَ الْجَمِيعُ.
sentences.translation: Zatim je i sam zakasno i svi su se nasmijali.
sentences.translationEn: Then he himself was late and everyone laughed.
